## Main Effects Models

The following models assess the main effects of closed-form cultural matching, open-ended cultural matching, and cultural network opacity on the odds of tie persistence. Model 1 shows that closed-form matches independently predict persistence. Model 2 introduces open-ended matches, demonstrating the value of incorporating both open and closed-form items. Model 3 incorporates cultural network opacity (the number of "Don't know" responses regarding an alter's preferences). The main effects model reveals that a lack of shared cultural knowledge signals a weaker tie.

```{r}
#| label: tbl-models
#| tbl-cap: "Odds Ratios for Tie Persistence (Main Effects Models)"

modelsummary(
  list("Model 1: Closed" = mod_closed, "Model 2: + Open" = mod_open, "Model 3: + Opacity" = mod_opac_base),
  stars = TRUE,
  exponentiate = TRUE,
  output = here::here("Tabs", "main_models.html"),
  coef_map = c(
    "num_match_closed" = "Closed-Form Matches",
    "open_match_count" = "Open-Ended Matches",
    "num_unknown" = "Cultural Network Opacity",
    "close_factorSomewhat Close" = "Subjective Closeness: Somewhat",
    "close_factorClose" = "Subjective Closeness: Close",
    "duration_" = "Tie Duration (Years)",
    "female_factorWomen" = "Ego: Woman",
    "alterfemale_factorWomen" = "Alter: Woman",
    "female_factorWomen:alterfemale_factorWomen" = "Ego Woman × Alter Woman",
    "same_dorm" = "Roommate/Dormmate",
    "is_friend" = "Friend",
    "freq_factorMonthly" = "Frequency: Monthly",
    "freq_factorWeekly" = "Frequency: Weekly",
    "freq_factorDaily" = "Frequency: Daily",
    "race_homophilyHomophilous" = "Race Homophily: Same Race",
    "race_homophilyUnknown" = "Race Homophily: Unknown",
    "periodWave 2 to 5" = "Time Period: Wave 2-5",
    "periodWave 5 to 6" = "Time Period: Wave 5-6",
    "(Intercept)" = "Intercept"
  ),
  gof_map = c("nobs", "r.squared", "aic", "bic", "rmse")
)

modelsummary(
  list("Model 1: Closed" = mod_closed, "Model 2: + Open" = mod_open, "Model 3: + Opacity" = mod_opac_base),
  stars = TRUE,
  exponentiate = TRUE,
  coef_map = c(
    "num_match_closed" = "Closed-Form Matches",
    "open_match_count" = "Open-Ended Matches",
    "num_unknown" = "Cultural Network Opacity",
    "close_factorSomewhat Close" = "Subjective Closeness: Somewhat",
    "close_factorClose" = "Subjective Closeness: Close",
    "duration_" = "Tie Duration (Years)",
    "female_factorWomen" = "Ego: Woman",
    "alterfemale_factorWomen" = "Alter: Woman",
    "female_factorWomen:alterfemale_factorWomen" = "Ego Woman × Alter Woman",
    "same_dorm" = "Roommate/Dormmate",
    "is_friend" = "Friend",
    "freq_factorMonthly" = "Frequency: Monthly",
    "freq_factorWeekly" = "Frequency: Weekly",
    "freq_factorDaily" = "Frequency: Daily",
    "race_homophilyHomophilous" = "Race Homophily: Same Race",
    "race_homophilyUnknown" = "Race Homophily: Unknown",
    "periodWave 2 to 5" = "Time Period: Wave 2-5",
    "periodWave 5 to 6" = "Time Period: Wave 5-6",
    "(Intercept)" = "Intercept"
  ),
  gof_map = c("nobs", "r.squared", "aic", "bic", "rmse")
)
```
